summary: Iteration 155: Verified OdA cost inclusion bug fix in margin analysis. All 18 tests passed. The fix correctly reads approvvigionamento.ordini[].importo_totale and conto_lavoro[].costo_totale into margin calculations.
critical_code_review_comments: margin_service.py line 99-110: Correctly reads approvvigionamento.ordini[].importo_totale for single commessa
margin_service.py line 124: costo_totale formula now includes costo_oda: costo_materiali_totale + costo_personale + costo_esterni + costo_oda
margin_service.py line 211: get_all_margins reads OdA costs: sum(o.get('importo_totale', 0) for o in c.get('approvvigionamento', {}).get('ordini', []))
margin_service.py line 216: Overview costo_totale includes costi_oda: costi_manuali + costi_fr + costi_oda + costi_cl + costo_personale
margin_service.py line 239: costi_materiali field includes OdA and CL: costi_manuali + costi_fr + costi_oda + costi_cl
Response includes oda_detail array with ordine_id, fornitore, importo, stato for transparency
seed_data_creation: Created 4 test commesse: (1) with single OdA €1029.87, (2) with multiple OdA totaling €3500, (3) without OdA for comparison, (4) with only conto_lavoro. All use user_id=TEST_oda_margin_user_155 and commessa_ids prefixed with TEST_ODA_155_. Automatic cleanup via pytest fixture.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 155 verified the OdA cost inclusion fix. Key changes: 1) margin_service.py now reads approvvigionamento.ordini[].importo_totale for each commessa, 2) costo_totale includes OdA costs in both single commessa and overview endpoints, 3) Response includes new 'costi_oda' field and 'oda_detail' array. Test commessa structure: { approvvigionamento: { richieste: [], ordini: [{ ordine_id, importo_totale, fornitore_nome, stato }], arrivi: [] } }. The fix resolves the bug where RdP → OdA (€1029.87) → Registra Arrivo costs didn't appear in margin analysis.
verified_fixes: costo_oda is calculated and added to costo_totale in single commessa endpoint
get_all_margins includes OdA costs via line 211: costi_oda sum
Overview costo_totale includes costi_oda in formula (line 216)
costi_materiali field in overview includes OdA and CL costs (line 239)
oda_detail array returned with ordine_id, fornitore, importo, stato
Empty ordini arrays handled safely with default {}
Zero importo_totale ordini are filtered out (if importo > 0 check)
